but nightmare for me later, i couldn't sleep without one nite without something wake me up in the middle of my sleep

so crazy,
and when i talk to the staff they are not helping and the want me to talk to the other room tenant so crazy 

i will never ever stay there again

reviews.title: Staff weird

reviews.title: No hot water all my stay and room clean is poor
reviews.text: Waste of money here no hot water at all after 01 week also no hot water I stuck here because of my long booking I never come back here and they charged 200 bathe just for pillow cover and it has some colour added it’s my mistake by 200 bath too much.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Dead coachroach behind light fixtures, shower curtain tar all along bottom, bathtub had tar or dirt ,for pennies they could make it nice
reviews.response:
Dear Khun Gary,

Warm greetings from PRS Hotel & Fitness !

Thank you for taking time to review our hotel on your visit in PRS Hotel & Fitness !
It was very disappointing to read that your experience with us did not meet our usual high standards. 

We do sincere apologies for all inconveniences you experienced during your stay.

I would like to thank you for providing your feedback on our service. 

I have taken note and wish to thank you for your comments. These are very valued for us to keep improving services and products to meet guest's expectation and satisfaction.

We sincerely wish your experience with us was a better one but we do hope you will give us the opportunity to serve you again in future when our offerings are better suited to your travel.

Sincerely yours,

Napat Punsudae (Khun Pat)
Guest service agent Supervisor

reviews.title: adequate and appropriate, pay to use gym.
reviews.text: was a good stay, reasnobly quite this time of year which doesnt bother me. the mini bar is now set up so you cannot put anything inside just take stuff out to get ripped off. the hotel is always trying to make things more expensive for an extra buck it seems. they used to have poor reception upping the rate of room per day as they felt need. but now reception staff seem are more well behaved. a very international young crowd always at this hotel.

reviews.title: Good location, good swimming pool and garden but very bad Wi-Fi connection and signal. Old room.
reviews.text: Very expensive breakfast price per person. I can’t get a Wi-Fi connection on my iPhone and my notebook, very bad Wi-Fi connection and signal.
reviews.response:
Dear Khun Kutsana,

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text: I had the hotel recommended to me by a friend who was very impressed with it Well my experience was completely the opposite. The room had an almost nauseous smell from the bathroom, there were an unbelievable number of flies, far too many to swat away. Apparently the window had been left open hence the invasion of flies.  Overall it was not a relaxing stay. It might have been we were unlucky with the room but - - - ?

reviews.title: Adequate room size but unpleasant smell
reviews.text: unpleasant smell, location not easy to find and not within walking distance of downtown pattaya

reviews.title: Not the 5-Star Experience We Expected
reviews.text:
⭐ 2/5 — Not a True 5-Star Experience

We booked a private pool villa based on the resort’s 5-star rating, but unfortunately, it didn’t live up to expectations.

From the start, the villa had several issues: the doors to the pool wouldn’t open, the pool light wasn’t working, and the in-room phone was dead, making it impossible to contact the front desk. Maintenance spent nearly three hours during our stay fixing everything, but we were never offered an apology or even basic acknowledgment of the inconvenience.

To make matters worse, we were woken up at 6:00 AM by loud hammering from staff working on a neighboring villa. After calling the front desk, the noise stopped — but the damage to our morning was done.

It felt like our concerns weren’t taken seriously or communicated to management. Very disappointing for a resort claiming a 5-star standard. Just a reminder that 5 stars doesn’t always mean 5-star service.

reviews.title: Budget hotel
reviews.text: It offers good quality price ratio.

reviews.title: Good Value
reviews.text: A good value hotel, located in a relatively quite area of Pattaya but not too far from the action. Some good pubs and restaurants are nearby and the beach is about 10 minutes away in a car. The hotel has a good pool area and there is a private gym ( additional cost ) as part of the hotel. Overall a good stay and good value .

reviews.title: Good Stay
reviews.text: Enjoyed the stay at this well priced hotel. The rooms and the location is Ok. There are a number of bars and eating places nearby. This is a no frills hotel and you get the basics ... any extra's ( like another towel ) are charged. The hotel has a good sized pool.  Be aware that the hotel is popular with young folk .

reviews.title: Ok - Just
reviews.text: Reasonable budget hotel located back from the main beach area. Rooms were Ok although everything was an extra...  an extra towel cost extra, a coffee cup cost extra etc. so you get the room but that is about it. No safe deposit boxes in room but you can get one at the front desk ... but it costs extra. So if you after a cheap bed and not much more its Ok but don't expect any of the frills.

reviews.title: Quiet, open, value for money
reviews.text: We left our booking very late and were lucky to get rooms. the swimming pool is nice and see's a lot of sun which is hard to find normally. Hotel a little bit out of way but its ok if you are looking for somewhere thats pretty cheap, quiet and has big rooms, good internet but maintenance of hotel needs to be improved. Hotel has great gym but cost 250 baht for day visit which isn't stated when booking. Overall I would recommend the hotel for the cost.

reviews.title: reasonable price
reviews.text:
first the place of the hotel is quite far from the beach road of south pattaya, need to take tuk-tuk or motorbike arrive or leave.

the service is good, staff is nice, bell boy help me to take the luggage upstairs without requesting any pay

the room is acceptable, the price is cheap actually, so it's quality-price ratio is still high. one feature: a bath tub in toilet.

reviews.title: Very dirty bedding
reviews.text:
Rooms need updating bed shirts need replacing as every set has staines. 
Good gym good pool and good location

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Value for money

reviews.title: local place at Pattaya
reviews.text:
This hotel is far from Beach lord and 2nd lord.
So, I can't recommend for First trip or second time.

But This hotel is good for long stay.
Have a good pool, Sauna, and Gym.
Have 7/11 and Laundry shop in near.

Local market also near.
You can eat local Thai food in there.

Very good price for long stay with breakfast.

...But, I didn't eat it so many.
Becouse, I always Hungover!!!!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
I had made a request for a specific room 3 days before arriving , checked in No body had check my request , 
The room I was given was horrendous, coffee stains every where  , floor covered in sand, cigarette burns In the bath, suppose to be none smoking, very damp smell, , construction going on next door cement all over the corridor, 
While having breakfast people smoking in the Restaurant, 
The Thai law now is No smoking in buildings, also 5000 baht fine, 
The breakfast was very Poor , 
I asked The staff about No Smoking , they just walked away , lose of FACE, 
I have stayed here for 3 years , 1 week every month,   It’s time to look for New Hotel  , 
The young boy in reception didn’t have a clue,

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
The location is quite central but you should have your own transport.  Lots of parking with security 24/7 which is great. Very good gym. I booked with breakfast but when I arrived I was told I didn't (this has happened twice), I contacted Agoda to query but just like the 1st time I was told I didn't.  Next time I will make sure I copy and save the reservation page. I was so upset about this that I canceled my next reservation 2 weeks later in Bangkok. Booked with another company. 
The room is spacious but doesn't have kettle and cups to have tea / coffee and if you want to wash things like socks and underwear you have nowhere to hang them. The hand wash basin and bath were both in poor condition and the shower curtain was full of mildew, not acceptable and should be addressed. All the staff are very pleasant, helpful and friendly.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Overall Good. would like to stay in. but little far from walking street is the only issue. But for those who has vehicle i would recommend this hotel for them.
reviews.positives: 1) comfortable room 2) Internet 3) Bathtub and bathroom

reviews.title: It is in a quiet place.
reviews.text: If you walk a little, there is a food stall village, and there is also a 7&11 right in front. The pool and gym are in a separate building, and the pool also has a sauna. There is a lot of greenery, which is nice, but that also means there are many bugs, which are annoying. There were a lot of mosquitoes in the room, so I sprayed insecticide everywhere.

reviews.text: For such a price and considering it in the City Of Pattaya, it definitely is a value for money stay. However room lighting is a bit dim and furnishing is slightly old. Other than that, a pleasant stay with ample car park space.

reviews.title: location no good but hotel great
reviews.text: during my stay there, the hotel and the room is very clean there is swimming pool and gym. but access to walking street is quite far away from hotel.

reviews.title: Nice!
reviews.text: No complains at all!

reviews.title: Service
reviews.text: The receptionist was friendly and spoke nicely, which left a great impression. However, when we checked out, we forgot something in the room. Normally, the housekeeping staff would check the room first to see if we stole anything or left something behind, but they didn’t inform us at all that we had forgotten something. This indicates that the housekeeping staff did not check the room, or if they did check and did not inform us about our forgotten item, that would be concerning. At the very least, they should have notified us after we checked out that we left something behind. Instead, we only realized it ourselves later. If it were a valuable item, it would have been a significant loss. When we forgot something at another hotel, they called to let us know. I’m very disappointed about this aspect.

reviews.title: Good hotel with some improvements
reviews.text:
Overall stay was good.
Clean rooms, clean hotel, staff was good.
Some improvements:
Even after asking for hot water in bathroom, its not provided.

reviews.title: Basically better than I expected
reviews.text:
I saw the hotel quiet in the low season and it was: 
Free reception and kind stuff. 
Cleanness. Above the average for  price I payed. Towels are white and fuzzy, bedding is clean and nice, lil fridge clean and no smell. 
Comfort. Above the average again. Nothing in particular just running water, silence, comfort bed and not ugly spacious room, everything I used worked well. 
Not good. Very unstable WI-FI; Cracked sink in the bathroom; Poor toiletries.

reviews.title: Clean and a good value.
reviews.text: Fine. Had two rooms with my wife, her mom and an infant. No problems. Wish they had a few more English speaking tv channels.
reviews.positives: Good location for our needs. Internet worked well.  Nice staff.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Convenient

reviews.title: Very Good Hotel but over Prices
reviews.text: Very Good Hotel, Clean and comfortable Bed, But not Smart and Big TV in all rooms, sometimes TV is very small in some rooms with zero base quality, Gym and Pool facilities is good, I like the room and staff.

reviews.title: Great price for quality
reviews.text:
I stayed by myself in this hotel for 4 nights.
Staff are all super nice and friendly.
Very clean big room which they clean daily.
Just be aware of a couple of things:
Rooms walls are paper thin, kept waking up at night either because of a baby crying on one side, people simply talking on the other side, or someone moaning above. If you’re a light sleeper this may be annoying to you.
The pool and gym are part of a fitness building next door, gym is really good with everything you need.
Pool on the other side is a bit disappointing. Barely gets any sunlight during the day, and also it’s smoking friendly (weirdly enough for a “fitness centre”) which means that you’ll have people smoking tobacco and cannabis on your face.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The staff service is good, and the facilities are complete, including a swimming pool. However, the room itself may not be very clean and looks a bit worn. Overall, it's considered okay for the price paid. If there is another opportunity, I will definitely stay again.

reviews.title: Was a good stay
reviews.text: Room was good... Shower great... Bed pretty comfortable... Easy access to property and guest friendly.... Had a clock on the wall which was nice and room was nice shape and nice chair with table... The pool is small although the photo makes it look big... If your a gym guy then this is the place for you.. Their gym is the best I've ever seen attached to the hotel... I liked it and bed was soft...

reviews.title: Back Packer
reviews.text: Nice hotel, Valueable, mind staff and a lot of facilities.

reviews.title: good but...
reviews.text: It was nice except that the first floor room smelled moldy, had some water damage. Location on a busy street a little bit far away but not too bad. Gym facilities seemed really good.

reviews.title: Great Facilities

reviews.title: Neat and cozy
reviews.text:
Quite a nice hotel tidy and spacious rooms. Hotel stuff is very helpful and friendly. Lots of storage place. 

The only drawbacks for me: 
- AC requires cleaning, that’s why room has dump smell
- the cafe played loud music till midnight. I was surprised that this place was nosier than a hotel on the walking street I stayed at previously

reviews.title: Great Gym
reviews.text: Breakfast included which was great.

reviews.title: Great Value for Fitness Users
reviews.text:
This was easily the best value hotel I've ever stayed at.

I paid around 600thb per night booking last minute on Agoda.  The cost includes access to a huge well equipped gym, swimming pool, sauna, steam room plus basic breakfast in addition to the hotel room.

The room was a bit dated as noted in other reviews - chipped furniture / old style TV etc.   Also nowhere to hang clothes on the balcony which was a but odd.  But the room was clean and the bed was a good size and comfortable.
The location is a bit hard to access - the road name in Thai is difficult to remember and it's not on a baht bus route.  Mototaxis or walking is the best option.
But for the price and the included facilities all this can easily be forgiven.

Great choice if you are on a budget and plan to use the fitness facilities.  I would definitely recommend.

reviews.title: People Smoking in Restaurant area while me a family family eat breakfast , The new smoking rules
reviews.text:
People smoking inBreKfadt area, in Thailand the new rules No smoking in Resturaunt , 
If you want to smoke you have to go 5 Myra from hotel Entrances, 
The staff when asked to tell customer about the  No smoking rules , walked away, Staff very in helpful, just laughed, 
Next time if it happens I will report it to the police, 
The hotel will be fine 5000 baht, and customer find , 
It’s very Rudd to smoke when people are eating food,

reviews.title: Good budget hotel with lots of facilities
reviews.text:
Pros -location, opposite to 7-11, free breakfast, opposite to a Thai restaurant, large fitness and a nice pool. Rooms are cleans and staff is wonderful 

Cons- everything is fine accept the swimming pool bathrooms( I think they were never been cleaned, the spider webs hanging from the roof are scary over the bathroom, I am kind of wondering how come the management haven’t notice those scary big spider webs) rest all is great about this hotel. I really recommend this hotel for the budget travellers. I myself stayed there for 5 days.

reviews.text: A good hotel to stay with. Good value for money. Good and well mannered staff. Only problems faced was disconnection in internet some times.

reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.text: It's true that it's a three-star hotel, but it doesn't feel like a three-star at all. Everything is great; there’s a sauna and a swimming pool. The scent in the bedroom is clean, everything is perfect, and the staff's service is very good.

reviews.title: Bachelors Pad
reviews.text:
I stayed here 20 days - chose this place for the gym and a place to set up my laptop... Very good for both. 

The room and hotel feel like a bachelor's pad :) 

The main downside is the road—lots of traffic.

reviews.title: Hotel PRS
reviews.text: The hotel is good & price also good a gym beside it with swimming pool free for hotel guests.. free gym membership for hotel guests.. gyms in Thailand are expensive so it saves a lot of money for me & the son.. £8.00 per visit each day if you’re not a guest from the hotel.. so is a win  win win for hotel guests..

reviews.title: Nice.. good value

reviews.text:
Great gym 
Great staff 
Pool good but not many beds get the sun. Need to cut trees back little.
Sauna good but need to fix steam room.
Rooms fine.
Great staff really helpful and polite. Lovely 💙🙏🏻

reviews.title: Valued
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: Great gym and nice pool. Very friendly staff.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Take care of Air conditioning maintenance, other things was perfect.

reviews.title: Very minor gripes...
reviews.text:
As with so many places in Thailand, some very minor fixes could make a stay exceptiona. My gripes are very poor internet, so neither the TV (on it's own WiFi) or my laptop would connect adequately (not a huge issue for a single overnight stay, but not being able to use my laptop over a longer stay would've been unacceptable!), and the door storage in the fridge was unusable, so the bottles and cans (of the minibar) took up all the main compartment storage space. As I say, very minor gripes, but if resolved, the say would've been perfect, and they are simple, low-cost, attention-to-detail fixes.

PS: Bed was  very comfy, and room clean and spacious.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: hi brian here friendly staff very clean  nice room nice buffet  no hassle quite and peaceful am from ireland

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel , staff never stop making your stay fell amazing ,
reviews.text: Good location , very clean hotel , great price ,

reviews.title: Good hotel because of excellent staffs (Thank you Mr. Kwon)
reviews.text: This hotel was one of several hotels that I stayed in during my long term trip. The hotel was much better  than my expectation. It is located in the crowded area but the stay was quiet. It fulfilled my needs. I was especially impressed by the supervisor(Mr. Kwon) . His service covered everything in every aspects(communication with English, explanation about the area and transportation.....etc... ). It is very good comparing with the price

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: That good

reviews.title: Hidden gem in South Pattaya
reviews.text:
This is a great hotel, just outside (south of) the Third Road "boundary". Being a little further out of town, it's a great balance of access vs price. A short taxi ride to central Pattaya takes 5-10 minutes (depending on time of day), or you can walk to TukCom area in about 10 mins.

The staff are very efficient and friendly, and even left a lovely welcome/birthday notice on my bed for my arrival. Such a nice, unexpected touch.

Heading back for a couple of nights again this weekend!

reviews.title: Hidden gem!
reviews.text:
Great hotel, just outside of the South Pattaya Road "ring", so off many people's radar. I like to walk a lot, so the distance to the beach/TukCom area is no hardship for me, but it's just a few minutes and about ฿50 by taxi to most places in South Pattaya.

Great staff, and very friendly & polite.

Rooms are a good size, and comfortable. Kettle and complimentary water/tea/coffee etc., and a lightly stocked mini bar, just in case. Some basic toiletries in the bathroom too, so everything needed for a short stay, bar a disposable toothbrush/toothpaste.

Just booked again (third time this year) for another weekend stay!

reviews.title: Best value hotels in Pattaya
reviews.text:
The room is spacious, featuring a personal desk, a clothes rack, and a large sofa in addition to the bed.

Overall, the staff's service is friendly, and there is free access to the gym next to the hotel, which is quite good for a hotel gym.

The location is in South Pattaya, relatively far from the center, but there is a 7-Eleven and a laundromat right in front, and a food market night market just a 3-minute walk away, making it convenient.

reviews.title: Best stay

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Great place for value and if you’re into fitness there is a great fitness facility as well! Location is farther from the beach but can get around easily with Grab and other ways - it’s Thailand! Lots of markets and food markets walking distance. I think the best part of our stay is the amazing and helpful staff!

reviews.title: Beautiful room, good staff, excellent location.
reviews.text: This is one of the budget hotels that I really liked. The staff was good and had a service mindset, and there was a welcome drink served during check-in. They also helped carry my luggage to the room. The downside was that the bathroom had a strong urine smell; I'm not sure if it was from the previous guest or the pipes. The room had no soundproofing at all. I stayed on the second floor, and other guests were closing their doors very loudly at night and even at 4 am, which kept waking me up throughout the night. There was no hairdryer in the room, but I could request one at the reception.

reviews.title: Pros & Cons
reviews.text:
Pros - Exceptional value for price paid. Gym. Pool. Staff helpful/knowledgeable/polite/friendly. I'm near 100 nights booked at PRS!
Cons - checking out.. Sad to leave

reviews.title: Cozy stay
reviews.text: Good place. Value for the money. Convenient to travel around. Large parking lot. Friendly staff.

reviews.title: Good stay.
reviews.text: Comfy bed. Large room. Convenient to travel around.

reviews.title: Large gym and nice swimming pool
reviews.text: Value for the money. Spacious room. 7-11 right across the hotel. Local shops and restaurants in a walking distance.

reviews.title: Good Hotel to stay near Hustle of Walking Street
reviews.text: We have amazing start

reviews.title: Beautiful, clean rooms at affordable prices, worth it.
reviews.text: It is a hotel located near the walking street. The hotel looks very new and the rooms are beautifully decorated beyond the price. There is a fitness center and a pool available for free use. There are restaurants and cafes on the ground floor of the hotel, and a 7-11 in front of the hotel. Importantly, there is a parking lot that can accommodate 10-20 cars comfortably.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The only down side it there is no balcony and you need transportation.

reviews.text: The only thing is it's a bit out of the way. If you have a moto then no problem. A gym that is state of the art.

reviews.title: Quiet location
reviews.text: Nice small hotel with great gym sauna and pool. Hotel is located out of The centers huzzle. If you want to go to center you need a taxi. Gym included The price and it is new with modern equipment. Staff was  friendly and made us feel very welcome . We really enjoyed our time at this hotel

reviews.title: Clean nice inexpensive
reviews.text: Fitness facility, nice breakfast, not far from Walking Street.

reviews.title: To many people smoking at the Restaurant at breakfast,
reviews.text: People smoking in None smoking rooms, my little boy was very sick,

reviews.title: Super Hotel with Swiming Pool & Fitness Center
reviews.text:
We were a solo traveler, but I recommend this hotel because of the location and it contains all the facilities you need like swimming pool and fitness center free.
It has a sauna as well.
Rooms are spacious.
There is 7X11 infront the hotel, massage shops nearby, laundry as well.

Very Good hotel for those who like to stay on a calm place.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr.Ahmed,

Warm greetings from PRS Hotel & Fitness !

I would like to thank you for choosing PRS Hotel & Fitness on your recent stay!

I am very pleased to read that you appreciated the friendliness and assistance of our staff and enjoyed your visit in our hotel. It is always encouraging for us to learn that our guests are satisfied with our services as it is what we strive for everyday. 

I appreciate you taking the time to share your positive comments with us. 

In the meantime, I have already shared this great feedback to our team as this will certainly motivate us to keep up the good work. 

Please rest assured that your complimentary comments will not create complacency, instead you have inspired us to maintain our level of service for valuable guests like yourself.

Sincerely yours,

Napat Punsudae (Khun Pat)
Guest service Supervisor

PRS Hotel & Fitness PATTAYA

reviews.title: Very nice and good hotel but should have hair dryer would be perfect

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
The PRS Hotel by Sojourn is great value for money, great location, friendly staff and a fully equipped gymnasium thrown in to complete the experience!!
This is a fantastic hotel & a perfect fit for any gym enthusiast. 
Highly recommended at this price point, by far the best value for money in Pattaya.
Will definitely stay there again...

reviews.title: Nice rooms and great fitness center included

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I recommend the hotel. The staff provides good advice. There is parking, a swimming pool, and a fitness center available. Across from the hotel, there is a 7-11, which is convenient.

reviews.title: Lovely boutique style hotel.
reviews.text: Lovely hotel with full gym / sauna. Quiet rooms. All Staff is amazing. Cleaning staff is one of the best teams I’ve ever seen. They are so attentive, friendly. I love it Here. A++

reviews.title: Fantastic stay
reviews.text: I stayed for a weekend, great clean, quiet room, gym, cafe and pool.  Friendly staff. And 711 is across the street, a short walk from the beach, markets and walking street.

reviews.title: Very pleasant discovery
reviews.text:
The location for me was the best, but would I stay again? Most definitely, and I'm going to be booking it for a future trip very soon. 
I can't say I used the gym or pool, but looking around them, I would say if you're into your fitness, this most definitely is a hotel you should check in to. 
The bed was comfortable, the room and shower room was clean, and the place had a nice relaxed feeling. 
The staff were always smiling, and helpful when needed. 
The location is about a 10 minute walk to south Pattaya road, and around a 14 minute to walking street. 
Remember to download the bolt app when you arrive, as it's a real handy app for getting around if you're feeling lazy! 
Would I stay here again? Most definitely, and I'll definitely be back later on this year

reviews.title: Worth it for a short trip.
reviews.text:
It is a budget hotel with amenities that exceed the price. Swimming pool, fitness center, room size, bathtub, smart TV. Convenient location with a 7-Eleven in front of the accommodation. It is very worthwhile. 
Disadvantages: The rooms are a bit old but functional, staying on the first floor there is a bit of disturbance, and being located on the road means there is some noise.

reviews.title: Mr. Mark
reviews.text: Highly recommend this wonderful place!!!

reviews.title: Amazing deal for a great place
reviews.text: I keep going there for a reason

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice pool and  clean room

reviews.title: Going before the countdown day with my partner.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a side street with plenty of food options. It's easy to walk and buy snacks, right across from 7-Eleven. The atmosphere of the hotel is really impressive, 10/10. There are a lot of activities to do, including sauna, fitness, and swimming pool. The room we got is 202, on the 2nd floor, a corner room with a very large balcony. The room is clean, compact, and comfortable to sleep in, with great air conditioning. The hotel decoration is beautiful, and there is a café downstairs. I must say I am very impressed; it was worth the money spent. I will come again! 🥰🤍❤️

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Hotel is renovated new and clean neatly,  staffs are super nice , gym is superb! Sauna included  🤩 for this price per night , nothing complain at all.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: good hotel, best gym, friendly staff, thanks

reviews.title: Excellent!
reviews.text: Excellent hotel 🏨 very quiet place, a little bit out the way of the main soi buakhao area but only a 20 min walk which is mainly through markets etc so not so bad, only 40 baht in a taxi otherwise, the gym is spectacular! Pool is great and sauna and steam room very good, for the money I'd say it'd be hard to beat! Rooms cleaned daily, nothing bad to say about it, top marks, Rud and Noi both went above and beyond with any questions I had, very happy 😊

reviews.title: Repeat customer stays again
reviews.text: I can't fault this place, other than the location is a bit out of the way although not too much, just over 10 minute walk to Walking Street

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Fantastic staff do anything for you I had a motorbike accident took me to hospital and wait for me outside 10out 10

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly staff, decent gym facilities and the free breakfast wasn’t bad..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: They guys are the best. I am vegetarian and when I told them I can't have their standard meal served in breakfast they specially cooked for me only vegetarian food.  That was so kind of them. This place is clean and offers many facilities that are not only on paper but actually exist, such as Gym, pool, housekeeping, breakfast and any kind of support.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Greatly enjoyed my recent stay  at PRS, it has the best hotel Gym I've ever been in and is more like a gym with a hotel attached as opposed to the other way round. The location may not be to everyones liking but I like that part of town so that was perfect for me and very cheap for what it was. The rooms were a little tired but the bed was comfortable and cleaned every day. They are renovating the rooms at present. Staff were very friendly and helpful. 
I would definitely stay here again.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr.Andrew,

Warm greetings from PRS Hotel & Fitness !
Thank you for taking time to review our hotel on your recent visit in Jomtien Pattaya

We are very happy to hear that you love our hotel and also the service. 

Your feedback will be shared to the team for the good job they are doing. 

Once again, thank you very much for your review we hope to welcome you to the hotel in the near future.It would be our pleasure to show you our true hospitality.

Sincerely yours,

Napat Punsudae (Khun Pat)
Guest service agent Supervisor

reviews.title: Would highly recommend this hotel, I stayed in a standard room for a few nights :)
reviews.text: The room was clean, spacious and had a shower and a bathtub, which was great after travelling for 7 months and only ever having a shower. The air con was great, balcony was spacious and had a pretty table and chairs. The staff were very friendly and helpful even some who did not speak much English were still happy to try and help. The breakfast was ok with toast and preserves, coffee, juice, fruit, fried eggs, meats and salad and also rice.  There was a gym and swimming pool that you could use which is good, and a few little restaurants right across the street. There was a 7-11 convenience ship right across the street and also a place that does laundry. The hotel is a little way out from main Pattaya to walk however a 5 minutes motorbike taxi got you to soi Diana and that area so I personally preferred the location as was not right in the middle of it all. Staff clean rooms daily if wanted and the hotel it's self is clean and tidy. I paid £13 per night and would definitely stay again!
reviews.response:
Dear Khun Sarah,

Warm greetings from PRS Hotel & Fitness !

Thank you very much for sharing such great feedback on your recent stay.

We are thrilled that you found our hotel to be wonderful and that you appreciated so many aspects of your stay with great service and your kind feedback is a true testimony to their efforts. 

I will be sure to recognize them for their efforts. 

Once again I would like to thank you for your kind feedback. Meanwhile, the team and I are looking forward to welcoming you back soon for another memorable stay.

Sincerely yours,

Napat Punsudae (Khun Pat)
Guest service agent Supervisor

reviews.text: The PRS Mansion Hotel was beyond great. Best kept secret in Pattaya, Thailand! Staff was as nice as could be. Hotel room was quite and clean., great value for the money. reviews.title: Great value for the price. Definitely recommend.
reviews.text: With this level of room condition and amenities, it is the best in its class in Pattaya. The exercise facilities are better than most hotels in Pattaya. They also sell protein shakes at the entrance, and after working out, it's great to use the pool to relieve muscle fatigue. The sun doesn't shine too strongly, making it nice to relax on the sunbeds. There is a Seven Eleven at the hotel entrance, and within a 5-minute walk, there are night markets, pharmacies, and laundry facilities all nearby. Additionally, it is quiet to use all rooms in the vicinity except for 1 to 4 rooms near the entrance. I think I will stay here again on my next trip.

reviews.title: Brilliant hotel with amazing gym attached
reviews.text: I was so happy to find this place, it's halfway between Pattaya beach and jomtien with easy access to both (can even walk all the way to walking street), 7-eleven right across the street, and a huge and new gym with attached pool available freely to guests, I had a lot of fun there! The pool loses the sun in the afternoon so best for mornings. The gym is air-conditioned and opened until late, treadmills point to the road so you can run while watching the world go by. Hotel staff is very friendly and cleaning crew is fantastic! I'll be happy to return :)

reviews.title: The air is very cold.
reviews.text: The bathroom is good, clean, and separate, but the water pressure is a bit low for those who like powerful showers. However, it's not a problem. There are plenty of amenities provided. The extra bed is also good, not flimsy. The staff are great on all fronts. The air conditioning is very cool, and there’s a lifesaver blanket. If there’s a chance, I would return to stay again. 👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.title: Accommodation suitable for relaxation that seeks tranquility.
reviews.text: Beautiful accommodation with a very nice atmosphere. There is a cafe next to it, a fitness center nearby, and a 7-Eleven across the street. The air conditioning is cool, the bed is very soft, and the bathroom is beautifully designed with glass. The TV can access Netflix and YouTube, and there is cable available. It's close to South Pattaya Walking Street, just a 5-minute walk away.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
This hotel is a hidden Gem, 
Great location , the staff are excellent always willing to help with any problems, 
Amazing food available at the hotel Restaurant, the best Gym around  with Excellent staff to help you,

reviews.title: Very nice and value !
reviews.text: The place was very good , quiet from loud or bars. i arrived earlier than the check in available and ask them to passed my bag pack there, the staff is very helpful. Also you can use the gym/fitness, swimming pool, sauna at the building next there (PRS Fitness), the small market for local food not too far and open til late night. will be back to stay there!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: good, service ok, staff friendly, suitable for travelers once recommended

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good 👍

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room was very clean, and the staff provided excellent service, taking good care of us. The breakfast was delicious as well. We went for our honeymoon, and they arranged the room beautifully for us. When we come back to Pattaya next time, we will definitely stay again. I give it a full 10! ❤️

reviews.title: The best cost-performance hotel & fitness club.
reviews.text: The accommodation is very satisfying for the price, and the staff is incredibly kind. The location is quite good, and it’s convenient to walk or ride a motorcycle to Walking Street. Right in front of the hotel, there are convenience stores, laundries, local restaurants, and massage places, so there was no inconvenience at all. Above all, the biggest advantage is the gym operated by the hotel, which guests can use for free. I highly recommend this hotel for those who must exercise during their travels.

reviews.title: Best Hotel
reviews.text: Best hotel in cheap price

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: Fantastic place old hotel with good stuff and need to rent a bike or pay for taxi I recommend for all who loved the sauna pool and fitness I loved that place fitt for me

reviews.title: Good hotel I like to stay again prs .its  high quality cleaning room and very friend staff of recept
reviews.text: Hotel located at centre of walking street and pattaya beach . And very good variety break fast . I’m so happy to stay prs hotel . I would like to thanks to Agoda they given good hotel and very close discount  . Finally hats up to prs hotel and Agoda team .  Thank you so much. Regards Mahesha dugga

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.response:
Dear Khun Poomrapee,

Warm greetings from PRS Hotel & Fitness !

Thank you very much for sharing such great feedback on your recent stay.

We are thrilled that you found our hotel to be wonderful and that you appreciated so many aspects of your stay with great service and your kind feedback is a true testimony to their efforts. 

I will be sure to recognize them for their efforts. 

Once again I would like to thank you for your kind feedback. Meanwhile, the team and I are looking forward to welcoming you back soon for another memorable stay.

Sincerely yours,

Napat Punsudae (Khun Pat)
Guest service Supervisor

PRS Hotel and Fitness Team.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Tres bien, rien a dire

reviews.title: Confortable y buena ubicación
reviews.text: Las habitaciones son cómodas y espaciosas. Hay muchos supermercados en la zona. Cuenta con un gimnasio bien equipado. El personal es atento y amable. Lo recomiendo 100%

reviews.title: The new fitness receptionist and stinginess
reviews.text:
The new girl at the fitness reception is a living horror, unpleasant, unsmiley ,unmotivated, arrogant, unfriendly.
 
She treats and talk to regular customers badly and has no concept of hospitality or even sports. 

I don't know if she has ever done any sports in her life apart from the fingers playing with her phone all day at work behind the reception counter.

I will mention also what I didn’t like in this hotel :

-The the total lack of soundproofing of walls doors and Windows  and the infernal noise of motorcycles on the road beside ,day and night.
Your brain is buzzing after few days and its impossible to sleep well.

-Doors slamming and people smoking in the rooms.

-Unfiltred and unchlorinated shower water that smells bad.

-Dirty towels.

- A somewhat stingy state of mind of this hotel on certain points.

Sorry but Even if the hotel staff is really good its not for me anymore .

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Piscine eau très froide

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Never clean under bed very dirty. Not have hot water for 1 week. Air-conditioning all time very strong cannot change nothing...

reviews.title: Murs en papiers
reviews.text:
Super salle de sport.
Sauna et hammam.

Par contre les murs sont en papiers et vous entendrez tout.
De plus les chambres sont super humides.

reviews.title: Déçu mais ça peut le faire
reviews.text:
A mon arrivée  à midi,et alors que j avais demandé au préalable  par email un early check-in payant, on me dit que le précédent client n a pas libéré la chambre : mensonge car en fait le client était parti à 11h et que le staff de nettoyage  faisait autre chose(mangeait....)
Très grande chambre,literie un peu ferme et clim bruyante.
Staff  de nettoyage  vociférant dans le couloir tôt  le matin(talkie-walkie à fond les manettes)
Piscine superbe se trouvant presque sur la rue avec  circulation incessante (prévoir casque anti-bruit) mais envahie par les moustiques/insectes sans parler des trop nombreux fumeurs de cannabis qui vous font partager les odeurs pendant t que vous nagez...
Par contre ,formidable salle de musculation !

Je.ne reviendrai pas là.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Piscine avec crapeaux pas de petit déjeuner alors compris dans le prix 185 euros la nuit .L autre piscine fermée .Déjà il reste que la chambre sympa.C est un peu abusé le prix.

reviews.title: shopping a pattaya
reviews.text: court sejour a pattaya pour faire du shopping , le prs est mon point de chute a patttaya, eviter les chambres du fond , des odeurs de sanitaires souvent lors de mes sejours; sinon la piscine sauna hammam vraiment sympa
reviews.positives: prix de la chambre correct , piscine

reviews.title: hotel refait a neuf
